concepts.name: Linear Equation
concepts.short_definition: An equation where variables are only raised to the power of one.

concepts.name: System of Equations
concepts.short_definition: A collection of two or more equations with the same variables.

concepts.name: Solution Set
concepts.short_definition: The set of all values that satisfy all equations in a system.

concepts.name: Unique Solution
concepts.short_definition: A system of equations that has exactly one set of values satisfying all equations.

concepts.name: No Solution
concepts.short_definition: A system of equations where no set of values can satisfy all equations simultaneously.

concepts.name: Infinite Solutions
concepts.short_definition: A system of equations where an unlimited number of value sets satisfy all equations.

concepts.name: Substitution Method
concepts.short_definition: Solving a system by expressing one variable in terms of another and substituting.

concepts.name: Elimination Method
concepts.short_definition: Solving a system by adding or subtracting equations to eliminate a variable.

concepts.name: Matrix Representation
concepts.short_definition: Representing a system of linear equations using a matrix.

concepts.name: Gaussian Elimination
concepts.short_definition: A systematic method using row operations to solve systems of linear equations via matrices.
